root: ^NICK: These pens are a little cute...
^[He seems to look at them wistfully before tearing his gaze away.]
^NICK: I - I don't WANT them, though. That stuff's for kindergarteners.

dreamvisited: ^NICK: Ah, they're not as cute anymore, but... they're still a little cute. Guess it doesn't change the fact these are for babies, though.
